entry_conditions_for_full_experiments: Support-only rows cannot enter main denominator.
Thresholds and claim boundaries are frozen before rerun.
portfolio_blockers: SemCodebook: row-level positive-miss taxonomy and causal contribution table.
CodeDye: positive-control sensitivity and v3 control rerun before any claim upgrade.
ProbeTrace: anti-leakage and threshold-free margin evidence.
SealAudit: low decisive coverage and needs-review taxonomy.
preservation_policy: Existing result artifacts are immutable; this scorecard adds reviewer-facing closure artifacts only.

gaps.closure_action: Build component contribution table with paired CI and family/language splits.
gaps.issue: Ablation evidence exists but is not yet distilled into a decisive per-component causal table.

gaps.closure_action: Join row outcomes and assign every miss to one primary failure bucket.
gaps.issue: 658 headline positive misses need row-level attribution.

gaps.closure_action: Publish structural recoverability theorem and connect variables to measured artifacts.
gaps.issue: Recoverability condition is implicit in current docs.

projects.next_experiment_allowed: Only after row-level miss taxonomy and causal contribution gate pass.

attack_negative_control_coverage.rationale: 48,000 negative controls with zero hits and multiple attack conditions.

baseline_control_strength.rationale: Official baseline bridge exists; reviewer-facing role table should remain explicit.

claim_discipline.rationale: No universal or no-retry claim is made.

evidence_scale.rationale: 72,000 rows, 10 admitted models, 5 families, and full scale buckets are best-paper scale.

innovation.rationale: Structured AST/CFG/SSA provenance with keyed scheduling and ECC is strong, but the theorem must be linked more directly to per-carrier row outcomes.

method_rigor.rationale: Negative controls and ablations are strong; row-level failure attribution remains the main rigor gap.

reproducibility.rationale: Artifacts and scripts are present; full rerun remains GPU/model dependent.

statistical_trust.rationale: CI and denominators exist; missed-positive taxonomy needs row-level CI.

gaps.closure_action: Improve known-control sensitivity through preregistered v3 dual-evidence protocol, not threshold tuning.
gaps.issue: 6/300 live signals and 170/300 positive controls are too weak for detection claims.

gaps.closure_action: Add null-audit utility table: FP bound, sensitivity, evidence completeness, cost per signal.
gaps.issue: Reviewer may ask why sparse evidence matters.

projects.next_experiment_allowed: v3 controls first; live DeepSeek rerun only after freeze gate and control gate pass.

attack_negative_control_coverage.rationale: Negative controls are clean; attack matrix must remain joined to claim records.

baseline_control_strength.rationale: Controls and official baseline direction are documented.

claim_discipline.rationale: The package correctly avoids contamination/prevalence/high-recall claims.

evidence_scale.rationale: 300 live rows plus controls is acceptable but not dominant for best-paper unless protocol contribution is emphasized.

innovation.rationale: Evidence-preserving null-audit framing is defensible and useful.

method_rigor.rationale: Protocol discipline is good, but positive-control misses need row-level diagnosis.

reproducibility.rationale: Hash retention and manifests are strong; provider rerun remains API-dependent.

statistical_trust.rationale: CI and support exclusion are explicit.

gaps.closure_action: Add leakage scan, same-provider unwrap, owner/task heldout checks.
gaps.issue: 300/300 can be attacked as shortcut or owner leakage.

gaps.closure_action: Generate owner margin CDF and rank/AUC summary.
gaps.issue: Threshold-free separation evidence is not yet main-surface.

gaps.closure_action: Run 5-owner support experiment; keep support-only unless full promotion passes.
gaps.issue: Single-owner scope is narrow for best-paper.

projects.next_experiment_allowed: Anti-leakage and margin gates first; multi-owner only as support until promotion.

attack_negative_control_coverage.rationale: False-owner controls are clean; leakage controls need formal gate.

baseline_control_strength.rationale: Wrong/null controls exist; multi-owner support is still missing.

claim_discipline.rationale: Single-owner and task-cluster boundaries are correctly preserved.

evidence_scale.rationale: 300 APIS, 1,200 controls, and 900 transfer rows are substantial but single-owner scoped.

innovation.rationale: Active-owner attribution with semantic witness and transfer receipts is strong.

method_rigor.rationale: Perfect APIS result requires stronger anti-leakage and margin evidence.

reproducibility.rationale: Receipts and hashes exist; live provider rerun remains external.

statistical_trust.rationale: Wilson intervals and independence boundaries are explicit.

gaps.closure_action: Run v5 second-stage conjunction to improve coverage without increasing unsafe-pass risk.
gaps.issue: 8.44% decisive coverage is too low for a strong utility claim.
879 needs-review rows are not yet split into reviewer-useful categories.

gaps.closure_action: Lock role-based support wording and forbidden claims.
gaps.issue: Expert support wording can be attacked if overstated.

projects.next_experiment_allowed: v5 prerun gate exists; claim-bearing v5 run only after row schema and unsafe-pass policy are locked.

attack_negative_control_coverage.rationale: Marker-hidden boundary and unsafe-pass tracking are strong; v5 attack conjunction should be main-surface.

baseline_control_strength.rationale: Controls and citation-only boundaries are present.

claim_discipline.rationale: No safety certificate or automatic classifier claim is made.

evidence_scale.rationale: 320 cases and 960 hidden rows are solid.

method_rigor.rationale: Explicit abstention is rigorous, but needs-review rows require finer taxonomy.

reproducibility.rationale: Artifacts and tests are present; human review is role-based support.

statistical_trust.rationale: Coverage-risk CI exists; coverage remains low.
